tagline: New SQL editor improvements: + New queries in Drafts folder: New queries are now created by default in the Drafts folder.
what_it_does: New SQL editor improvements: + New queries in Drafts folder: New queries are now created by default in the Drafts folder. When saved or renamed, they automatically move out of Drafts. + Query snippets support: You can now create and reuse query snippets—predefined segments of SQL such as JOIN or CASE expressions, with support for autocomplete and dynamic insertion points.
why_it_matters: New SQL editor improvements: + New queries in Drafts folder: New queries are now created by default in the Drafts folder.
plain_summary: New SQL editor improvements: + New queries in Drafts folder: New queries are now created by default in the Drafts folder. When saved or renamed, they automatically move out of Drafts.
